title: Automation to reset statuses?
excerpt: When moving a task to a new group, I would like the Status to reset from “Approved” to default status. Is there an automation that can accomplish this?

posts.author: hollandmorris (Holland Morris)
posts.cookedHtml: When moving a task to a new group, I would like the Status to reset from “Approved” to default status. Is there an automation that can accomplish this?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hollandmorris - yes there is! You can use a custom automation like the following:

image1127×399 21.3 KB

Hope this helps!

posts.author: hollandmorris (Holland Morris)
posts.cookedHtml: Looks like you had to type in the default status though in order for it to show - is there any way this would be feasible without typing in the default status and just having it reset to the blank gray?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @hollandmorris

Sure you can build a custom automation that would clear a status.

image1501×380 15.4 KB

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml: Hmm, I don’t see a “clear Status” option. Is it still available?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: sure it is available in the custom recipe builder
